positive: A highly stylized, intricate geometric representation of a nocturnal forest scene. Focus on a central composition featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna, such as glowing mushroom clusters, silhouettes of elegant celestial deer, and crescent moon motifs integrated into the foliage. The style should be inspired by detailed Art Nouveau mandalas and Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints, rendered with high contrast ink work and pops of ethereal, limited jewel-toned luminosity (deep indigo, jade green, sapphire blue). Use strong, clean silhouettes against a dark, cosmic midnight background. Minimalist, decorative, suitable for a repeating apparel pattern or central graphic. Vector art quality, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, grainy, poor quality, artifacts, lowres, noise, text, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, fuzzy, photographic, realistic photo, jpeg artifacts
